mapper.select: SELECT aa.*, a.title as activity_name, v.username as volunteer_name, a.address as activity_address, a.start_time as activity_start_time, a.end_time as activity_end_time FROM activity_application aa LEFT JOIN activity a ON aa.activity_id = a.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON aa.volunteer_id = v.id WHERE aa.id = #{id}

SELECT aa.*, a.title as activity_name, v.username as volunteer_name, a.address as activity_address, a.start_time as activity_start_time, a.end_time as activity_end_time FROM activity_application aa LEFT JOIN activity a ON aa.activity_id = a.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON aa.volunteer_id = v.id WHERE aa.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY aa.apply_time DESC

SELECT aa.*, a.title as activity_name, v.username as volunteer_name, a.address as activity_address, a.start_time as activity_start_time, a.end_time as activity_end_time FROM activity_application aa LEFT JOIN activity a ON aa.activity_id = a.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON aa.volunteer_id = v.id WHERE aa.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY aa.apply_time DESC

SELECT aa.*, a.title as activity_name, v.username as volunteer_name, a.address as activity_address, a.start_time as activity_start_time, a.end_time as activity_end_time FROM activity_application aa LEFT JOIN activity a ON aa.activity_id = a.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON aa.volunteer_id = v.id ORDER BY aa.apply_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_application (activity_id, volunteer_id, status, reason, reject_reason, apply_time) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{volunteerId}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{rejectReason}, #{applyTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT aa.volunteer_id) FROM activity_application aa INNER JOIN activity a ON aa.activity_id = a.id WHERE a.category_id = #{categoryId} AND aa.status = '已通过'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_application WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.category_id) FROM activity_application app INNER JOIN activity a ON app.activity_id = a.id WHERE app.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND app.status = '已通过'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_application WHERE status = '已通过'
